change: Initial release with basic ipTIME support
Added SNMP v3 support and improved device tracker for legacy firmware
Implemented Beta UI (AX-series) support with manual cookie injection and URN updates
Fixed NameError in __init__.py, switched to private session, and added comprehensive diagnostic logging
Corrected IndentationError in api.py and added pysnmp availability check
Added detailed ImportError logging for pysnmp diagnosis
Downgraded pysnmp-lextudio to stable version 5.0.34 for better compatibility
Added pyasn1 to requirements to resolve missing octets module error
Pinned pyasn1 < 0.5.0 to resolve compatibility issues with newer versions
Improved AES protocol imports for better compatibility with different pysnmp versions
Added full traceback logging for SNMP request exceptions to aid debugging
Fixed boot hang issue by skipping SNMP on initial setup
Strengthened SNMP robustness with individual request timeouts and detailed logging
Fixed SNMP config key typos to ensure v3 settings are correctly applied
Stable Release: All sensors (DNS, MAC, Traffic) and ScannerEntity-based presence tracking are fully functional on AX-series
Feat: Added Firmware Auto Upgrade button using SNMP setCmd (OID: 1.3.6.1.4.1.12874.1.5.6.0)
Feat: Added binary sensors for WAN and network ports status using SNMP
Feat: Expanded WiFi info with security and broadcast status via SNMP
UI: Changed WiFi sensor state to SSID and moved channel info to attributes
UI: Added band prefix (e.g., [5G]) to WiFi sensor state for better differentiation
Fix: Robust OID prefix check in WiFi table walk to resolve 0 SSID detection issue
Fix: Optimized interface (WAN/LAN) discovery using table walk for better multi-port support
Fix: Robust tuple-based OID comparison for WiFi and interface discovery to resolve collection issues
Fix: Corrected interface OID path (.1.2.2.1) to restore WAN/LAN sensor data
UI: Simplified WiFi sensor name by removing redundant SSID from title
UI: Updated WiFi interface binary sensors to show band in name and status as On/Off
Fix: Switched to standard MIB-II OIDs with 64-bit counter support for accurate traffic monitoring
Feat: Added WiFi SSID On/Off control switches (requires Read/Write SNMP mode)
Fix: Robust dynamic indexing for SNMP table walks to resolve data collection drops
Feat: Added WiFi SSID Broadcast (visibility) switches
Fix: Added missing SNMP mode constants to const.py to resolve ImportError
Fix: Accurate WiFi status detection using essEnable OID for On/Off synchronization
Fix: Prevent SNMP-only entities from being registered if SNMP is disabled in settings
Feat: Improved options flow with device management and manual MAC entry
Feat: Added SNMP Read-Only mode to hide control entities (buttons) for safer monitoring
Fix: Optimized WiFi data collection using table walk to ensure multi-band (5G/6G) channels are detected
Refactor: Switched to ipTIME Enterprise MIB only for SNMP collection (Traffic sensors disabled)
Fix: Corrected Reboot OID and restored missing variables in WiFi SNMP walk loop
